title: GCP SM get/put zeroization gaps: fix the documented TODO
description: Two ZEROIZATION GAP comments in secretx-gcp-sm/src/lib.rs are known but unfixed. get uses resp.json() which materializes the entire response through serde_json non-Zeroizing allocations; put uses serde_json::json!() and base64::encode() which leak base64-encoded secret material into heap. Fix: read response as bytes, hand-extract payload.data bytes with json_navigate/extract_path_field (now available in secretx-core), base64-decode into a Zeroizing buffer. Build the put body by hand without serde_json. Vault backend already demonstrates this pattern.
